topics.label: Understanding Malbolge
topics.description: Designed to be nearly impossible. The first program took 2 years to write.

topics.label: Ternary & Self-Modification
topics.description: Uses base-3 (ternary) and self-modifying code. Instructions mutate after execution.

topics.label: The 8 Operations
topics.description: Jump, output, input, rotate, crazy operation, nop, halt, and move.
